title: Minceraft
description: Replaces the Regular ol' 'Minecraft' Logo Text with a Rarer 'Minceraft' one.
body: As most of us know, there has been a little Easter Egg that Notch put in the game a while back, said Easter Egg would make it so that there would be a tiny chance for the 'Minecraft' Text to change to 'Minceraft' for a split-second (I've caught it a few times). This pack aims to make it stay as 'Minceraft' and remind you of the funny little Easter Egg Notch put before he left.
